# Quick Fix: Brand Color Update — #D71921 → #E8254B, #B5141B → #C41E3E
Generated: 2026-04-02

## Change Made

All occurrences of the old red brand color replaced with the new value across 10 web app files.

| Old value | New value |
|-----------|-----------|
| `#D71921` | `#E8254B` |
| `#B5141B` | `#C41E3E` |
| `rgba(215,25,33,` | `rgba(232,37,75,` |
| `rgba(215, 25, 33,` | `rgba(232, 37, 75,` (none found, already in compact form) |

## Verification

- Final grep for `#D71921`, `#B5141B`, `rgba(215,25,33,`, `rgba(215, 25, 33,`: **0 matches** across all web files.

## Notes
